metadata._comment: Curated set of notable Malawian natural features. Place names, categories and coordinates are factual geographic data (not copyrightable) and are stored locally. Coordinates are representative label points (approximate), not survey-grade. Elevations in metres.
metadata.license: Public-domain geographic facts (names & coordinates). Safe for commercial use.

properties.name: string
properties.featureType: peak | massif | plateau | highland | hills | range | lake | river | wetland | park | reserve
properties.description: string (optional)

properties.name: Sapitwa Peak
properties.description: Highest point in Malawi and in south-central Africa, on the Mulanje Massif.

properties.name: Mulanje Massif
properties.description: Granite inselberg massif rising abruptly from the surrounding plain; a biosphere reserve.

properties.name: Zomba Plateau
properties.description: Forested plateau above the old capital Zomba; highest point Malumbe.

properties.name: Shire Highlands
properties.description: Fertile upland plateau between the Shire River and Lake Chilwa; includes Blantyre.

properties.name: Nyika Plateau
properties.description: Rolling montane grassland plateau, the largest in central Africa; within Nyika National Park.

properties.name: Viphya Plateau
properties.description: High plateau and Africa's largest man-made forest, between Mzuzu and Kasungu.

properties.name: Mafinga Hills
properties.description: Hill range on the Zambia border; among Malawi's highest northern points.

properties.name: Dedza Mountain
properties.description: Prominent peak overlooking Dedza town in the central highlands.

properties.name: Kirk Range
properties.description: Highland range along the southwestern border with Mozambique.

properties.name: Lake Malawi
properties.description: Africa's third-largest lake; a UNESCO site famed for its cichlid fish diversity.

properties.name: Lake Malombe
properties.description: Shallow lake on the Shire River just south of Lake Malawi.

properties.name: Lake Chilwa
properties.description: Endorheic lake and Ramsar wetland on the Mozambique border.

properties.name: Lake Chiuta
properties.description: Freshwater lake straddling the border with Mozambique.

properties.name: Lake Kazuni
properties.description: Small lake within Vwaza Marsh Wildlife Reserve, known for hippos.

properties.name: Shire River
properties.description: Malawi's largest river; the only outflow of Lake Malawi, draining south to the Zambezi.

properties.name: Bua River
properties.description: River flowing through Nkhotakota Wildlife Reserve into Lake Malawi.

properties.name: North Rukuru River
properties.description: Northern river draining the Nyika highlands into Lake Malawi.

properties.name: Songwe River
properties.description: River forming part of the border with Tanzania.

properties.name: Linthipe River
properties.description: Central river flowing through the Lilongwe plain to Lake Malawi.

properties.name: Elephant Marsh
properties.description: Extensive seasonal wetland on the lower Shire River, rich in birdlife.

properties.name: Nyika National Park
properties.description: Malawi's largest national park, protecting the Nyika Plateau grasslands.

properties.name: Kasungu National Park
properties.description: Wooded national park on the Zambian border, with miombo woodland and elephants.

properties.name: Nkhotakota Wildlife Reserve
properties.description: Rugged miombo reserve along the Bua River; site of a major elephant translocation.

properties.name: Vwaza Marsh Wildlife Reserve
properties.description: Wetland-and-woodland reserve adjoining Lake Kazuni.

properties.name: Lake Malawi National Park
properties.description: World's first freshwater national park, at Cape Maclear on the lake's southern shore.

properties.name: Liwonde National Park
properties.description: Premier wildlife park along the Shire River, with elephants, hippos and rhinos.

properties.name: Lengwe National Park
properties.description: Lower Shire park, the southern limit of the nyala antelope's range.

properties.name: Majete Wildlife Reserve
properties.description: Restored Big Five reserve in the lower Shire valley.

properties.name: Mwabvi Wildlife Reserve
properties.description: Malawi's smallest and most remote reserve, at the country's southern tip.
